entries.definition:
ج/و/و j–w–w atmosphere, the arch of the sky, air, the space between the face of the earth and what appears to be the sky; large expanse of open land. Of this root, جَوّ jaww occurs once in the Qurʾan.
جَوّ jaww [n.] mid-air, air (16:79) أَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ إِلَى ٱلطَّيْرِ مُسَخَّرَٰتٍ فِى جَوِّ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَا يُمْسِكُهُنَّ إِلَّا ٱللَّهُ do they not consider the birds, sustained (or, enabled) [lit. subjected] in the air of the sky, nothing holding them up except God?
entries.definition_english:
ج/و/و j–w–w atmosphere, the arch of the sky, air, the space between the face of the earth and what appears to be the sky; large expanse of open land. Of this root, جَوّ jaww occurs once in the Qurʾan.
جَوّ jaww [n.] mid-air, air (16:79) أَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ إِلَى ٱلطَّيْرِ مُسَخَّرَٰتٍ فِى جَوِّ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَا يُمْسِكُهُنَّ إِلَّا ٱللَّهُ do they not consider the birds, sustained (or, enabled) [lit. subjected] in the air of the sky, nothing holding them up except God?
